name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: Do you approve of…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Share your thoughts with the President |
---
| | | | | | | | [ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3072c1683e5900a8fab67da51f5937c98f56c25a8c8831bebcfcc8917a4da9402b71ad7ec11f8234c40347d2a8ef05eb)
---

Peter,

We're working every day in this Administration to advance the bold America First agenda you voted for.

That's why it's important the President knows where you stand, and why every once in awhile we reach out to get your input.

**[To take our weekly approval poll, head here->](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3072c1683e5900a842e7268d9501bef376f4915c4319c6ee41aa8b0dd3a80866abc54e8b9eb7efe63f79ce7fdec3a78e)**

_**This week we are asking you to share your thoughts on Paul Ryan, Mitch McConnell, and President Donald J. Trump.**_

It's a quick, 4-question poll to see where you stand on our leaders and progress. **[So be sure to share your thoughts with the President today.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3072c1683e5900a82ef25163d8dfc66e260c6b4dd64bab48886342d9dfe791492a5d620a03f657d9ef6b505ec7e872a3)**

Thank you,

Team TRUMP

name: Team Kaine
subject: Building toward the future - will you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Kaine for Virginia
Derek --

Right now, we're facing one of the most challenging political and cultural moments in our country's history. At a time when Americans need to come together, our president is trying to drive us further apart. And Ed Gillespie is right there with him. Instead of working towards solutions, they're making cynical attempts at dividing people to score political points. Case in point: Ed has been running a shameful smear ad falsely accusing Ralph Northam, a decorated Army veteran, of supporting the violent gang MS-13.

And earlier this month, Trump echoed that message online to his millions of followers:

Will you donate today to help make sure we keep Virginia blue? [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-virginia-democrats?refcode=20171022va&amount=25 ]

It couldn't be clearer that instead of bringing people together to talk about the issues they care about, Gillespie and Trump are set on peddling fear and bigotry. Poll numbers show the Governor's race tightening as we come down the final stretch to November 7th. We have to step up right now and let them know that Virginia is for lovers, and love can still trump hate.

Will you chip in to help Democrats Ralph Northam, Justin Fairfax, and Mark Herring win in November, and set us up for success in 2018?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express donate $15 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-virginia-democrats?express_lane=true&refcode=20171022va&amount=15 ] Express donate $25 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-virginia-democrats?express_lane=true&refcode=20171022va&amount=25 ] Express donate $50 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-virginia-democrats?express_lane=true&refcode=20171022va&amount=50 ] Express donate $100 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-virginia-democrats?express_lane=true&refcode=20171022va&amount=100 ] Or, donate a different amount >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-virginia-democrats?refcode=20171022va ]

Ralph, Justin, and Mark are running campaigns based on hope and building toward a progressive future, while Gillespie and his Republican ticket have fully gotten aboard the Trump train.

This election will send a message about Virginia's identity and what kind of Commonwealth we want to work, live, and raise a family in. That's why it's so important to support our ticket of Ralph Northam, Justin Fairfax, and Mark Herring. The nation's eyes are on us, and what happens in Virginia will have ripple effects throughout our entire country.

Will you donate today to help make sure we keep Virginia blue? [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-virginia-democrats?refcode=20171022va&amount=25 ]

Thank you.

-Team Kaine

DONATE [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-virginia-democrats?refcode=20171022va&amount=25 ]

Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please unsubscribe [ http://action.timkaine.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/?Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1379606 ].

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I refuse
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Do you want to know the sad thing about Washington these days? We can't have a civilized debate anymore. You can't argue with ideologues like Speaker Paul Ryan. They simply don't care that repealing the Affordable Care Act would leave millions of people uninsured. They don't care if their actions drive up premiums or reduce access to critical preventative health care services. To them, repealing or sabotaging the Affordable Care Act is about one thing: Politics. They want to get rid of President Obama's crowning achievement. What happens afterward is irrelevant. Their plan is working. Thanks to sabotage and uncertainty caused by President Trump and Republicans in Congress, our health care markets are destabilizing. And instead of working to fix the problems, they do nothing -- just to see the markets collapse. **Well, I refuse.** I refuse to let 23 million Americans lose insurance. I refuse to go back to the days when insurance companies ruled our health care system. I refuse to return to a time when people like me, with pre-existing conditions, couldn't find affordable care. **If I have to spend every single day of this ridiculous Administration fighting to preserve access to affordable health care, that is what I will do.** No family in Florida should lose coverage or be put at risk because Speaker Ryan and President Trump can't see past their own politics. [_**I need you with me, every step of the way. To keep this network going strong, we need to reach $15,000 by the end of the month. Last I checked, we were still a bit short. So please, if you can, stand with me by giving $5, $10, or more.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e1a/622b7b5b/6dc038e/307bd03b/3382821624/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171021?refcode=dwse171021_m&recurring=true&amount=5") You can count on me to keep fighting for your health care. Thank you for fighting beside me. Debbie | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e1a/622b7b5b/6dc038e/307bd03b/3382821624/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171021?refcode=dwse171021_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---

Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e1a/622b7b5b/6dc038e/307bd03a/3382821624/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Puerto Rico and the Virgin Islands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
More than a month after Hurricanes Irma and Maria hit Puerto Rico, millions of our fellow American citizens are still suffering.
#
Dear Sisters and Brothers -
More than a month after Hurricanes Irma and Maria hit Puerto Rico, millions of our fellow American citizens are still suffering. Power remains out for much of the island, many don't know where their next meal is going to come from, and we are hearing horrifying stories of families so desperate that they are getting drinking water from hazardous waste sites.
The people of Puerto Rico are feeling isolated, fearful of the future and are wondering whether anyone on the mainland cares about them in the midst of this unprecedented crisis.
In just a few days, I am going to visit Puerto Rico myself to talk with families and listen to their stories. I will also be meeting with governmental leaders. I want the people there, as well as those in the Virgin Islands, to know that they are not alone, they have not been forgotten in their time of need. We will help.
**[Please make a $3 donation to these charities helping our sisters and brothers in Puerto Rico and the Virgin Islands who are suffering in the aftermath of Hurricanes Irma and Maria.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pr-usvi?refcode=bernie-em171021-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pr-usvi?refcode=bernie-em171021-full")**
Also, as a U.S. Senator, I want you to know I will demand that all the communities that have been impacted by the recent extreme weather disturbances be treated equally in terms of federal disaster relief, whether they are in Texas, Florida or Puerto Rico. We are one nation and we must stand together.
The time is long overdue for Congress to understand that these recent disasters, and those that will surely follow, are exacerbated by climate change. How insane is it to pour billions of dollars to rebuild devastated communities while continuing the same policies that led to their destruction? Now is the time to aggressively transform our energy system away from fossil fuels to energy efficiency and sustainable energies like wind and solar. Now is the time to begin the process of preventing future disasters.
While the rebuilding of Puerto Rico will be a long and difficult process, it will be of enormous comfort for the people living there to know that they are not alone and that we stand with them. Please help the people of the island obtain the food, water, electricity, housing and other basic necessities they need.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
****[DONATE TO HELP THOSE IN NEED](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pr-usvi?refcode=bernie-em171021-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-pr-usvi?refcode=bernie-em171021-full")****
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Team Donnelly
subject: Our Indiana Voice?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
State Rep. Mike Braun is trying to buy himself Indiana's U.S. Senate seat. He started out by signing a check for nearly $1 million of his own money to fund his campaign |
---

| | **" Group with no spending limit created to help Mike Braun win"**
\-- _Indy Star,_ 10/20/17 Peter -- State Rep. Mike Braun is trying to buy himself Indiana's U.S. Senate seat. He started out by signing a check for nearly $1 million of his own money to fund his campaign -- and he made it clear there's plenty more where that came from.

But that's only the beginning. Now, Republicans are coming to Indiana from out of state and setting up a Super PAC. Its one goal: purely to get Rep. Braun elected. They're calling it "Our Indiana Voice," although it's anything but that. It's simply a way to let his millionaire friends pour their own money in to influence our election.

Peter, I don't have to tell you how big of a deal this is. Our democracy is supposed to make sure that everyone's voice is heard, not just a powerful few. But if the people behind Rep. Braun's Super PAC have their way, unlimited, unaccountable money will decide this race, not hardworking Hoosiers. His out-of-state allies will spend big to distort Joe's record, mislead voters, and send another one of their friends to the Senate. **Please contribute TODAY
and help defeat this unaccountable Super PAC. >>**
| _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
********[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c8/7377f838/34c87834/51fb847c/1238889362/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20171022nd&amount=10")********
********[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c8/7377f838/34c87834/51fb847f/1238889362/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20171022nd&amount=25")********
********[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c8/7377f838/34c87834/51fb847e/1238889362/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20171022nd&amount=50")********
********[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c8/7377f838/34c87834/51fb8479/1238889362/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20171022nd&amount=100")********
******[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c8/7377f838/34c87834/51fb8478/1238889362/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20171022nd")******
Rep. Braun's allies want Joe gone because they know their friend will be another rubber stamp for them in the Senate. Joe doesn't listen to the people who fund a personal Super PAC, but hardworking people like you. He doesn't have access to unlimited money for his campaign -- but he's got the backing of the grassroots across the state, and a campaign fueled by people who dig deep and give what they can.

**We can 't let "Our Indiana Voice" drown out the real voices of Indiana. [Chip in today to fight back against Rep. Braun's unaccountable Super PAC and make sure Hoosiers have someone who fights for them in the Senate. >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c8/7377f838/34c87834/51fb847b/1238889362/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20171022nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Team Donnelly
** **

******[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c8/7377f838/34c87834/51fb847a/1238889362/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20171022nd&amount=25")******
---
** **

|

---

name: battleground-update@dscc.org
subject: Alabama special election is "rare opportunity" to flip state blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
NPR reported today that we have "a rare opportunity" to win back the Alabama Senate seat in December's special election.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171022-Battleground_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
_**NPR: "Democrats Eye A Rare Opportunity In Alabama Senate Race"**_
Team,

_NPR_ reported today that we have "a rare opportunity" to win back the Alabama Senate seat in December's special election to fill Jeff Sessions' Senate seat.

Republican Roy Moore is quickly alienating Alabama voters with his extreme right-wing rhetoric and a recent _Fox News_ poll even showed the race tied.

We still face an uphill battle -- Alabama hasn't elected a Democratic Senator in more than 20 years -- but it's clear this state is competitive. And what happens next will depend on supporters like you.

[**Will you contribute $1 now to help fund our organizing efforts in Alabama and ensure our Democratic Senate candidates can compete in every state?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171022-Battleground_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Doug Jones is the underdog in this race, but as he told _NPR_ this week, he's no stranger to taking on long shot fights.

As he said, "It's not the first time that I heard that something I wanted to do, something I was passionate about, was a long shot. When we prosecuted old Klansmen for the 1963 bombing of 16th Street Baptist Church, I was told, 'It's a long shot, Doug.'"

Doug overcame the odds then and now he's fighting his heart out to make sure Democrats compete for every vote in every state -- and he's counting on our support.

**Chip in $1 now to take on Republicans everywhere, starting with the Alabama special election:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/compete-in-every-state**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171022-Battleground_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

When we prosecuted old Klansmen for the 1963 bombing of 16th Street Baptist Church, I was told, 'It's a long shot, Doug.'"
